name: bandit.multi_camp_structural_stress_mcw
description: Challenge A for CAOL-MULTI-CAMP-SIGNAL-GAUNTLET-v0: two clean bandit camps with non-overlapping five-member rosters each receive a distinct structural_bounty lead. The run waits through bounded live structural maintenance, requires both camps to dispatch, perform stalking checks, harvest, and persist honest after-state: the west camp returns idle with its fixture lead harvested, while the east camp proves no-repeat by harvesting its fixture lead and immediately continuing on a newly generated structural target instead of repeating the same one. Two camps are used instead of four to avoid duplicate fixture member ids; that is a deliberate challenge-quality boundary, not setup shrinkage folklore.
artifact_patterns: structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@138,52,0
structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@160,39,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@162,40,0

steps.label: post_load_multi_camp_structural_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the two-camp structural stress fixture; this is startup/load footing before the bounded structural wait
steps.failure_rule: If gameplay does not load, no multi-camp structural proof can be credited.

steps.label: preflight_original_camp_structural_lead
steps.abort_reason: original camp preflight did not contain the clean five-ready structural bounty footing
steps.expected_immediate_state: original camp has five ready members, no active outside group, and an unharvested structural bounty forest lead before the live wait

steps.label: preflight_east_camp_structural_lead
steps.abort_reason: east camp preflight did not contain the second clean five-ready structural bounty footing
steps.expected_immediate_state: east camp has five ready members, no active outside group, and an unharvested structural bounty forest lead before the live wait

steps.label: wait_3_hours_for_two_camp_structural_dispatch_and_first_harvest
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the 6-hour duration menu for the two-camp structural stress window
artifact_state_patterns: structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@140,51,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@138,52,0
structural outing stalking check kept arrival open lead=overmap_special:bandit_camp@160,39,0#lead:structural_bounty:forest@162,40,0
steps.expected_visible_fact: first bounded 3-hour wait drives both camps into structural outings and proves at least the original camp harvests while the east camp remains an active non-dogpiled structural outing if not yet arrived
steps.failure_rule: If this first wait lacks both dispatches, both stalking checks, original harvest, and perf counters, Challenge A is not green.

steps.label: wait_3_hours_for_east_structural_followthrough_harvest
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the 6-hour duration menu for the two-camp structural stress window
steps.expected_visible_fact: second bounded 3-hour wait continues the already-active east structural outing until arrival/harvest instead of duplicating or losing it
steps.failure_rule: If the second wait lacks east harvest/return evidence, preserve the active-outing state as yellow rather than pretending no-repeat closure.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_multi_camp_structural
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the multi-camp structural stress wait

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_multi_camp_structural
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the multi-camp structural stress wait

steps.label: audit_saved_original_camp_harvested_no_repeat
steps.abort_reason: saved state did not persist original camp harvested/no-active/no-repeat state

steps.label: audit_saved_east_camp_harvested_no_repeat
steps.abort_reason: saved state did not persist east camp harvested fixture lead plus active new structural followthrough/no-repeat state

steps.label: audit_two_camp_structural_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show both camps' structural dispatch/harvest plus compact perf counters

evidence_contract.claim: two clean bandit camps with distinct structural bounty leads can both dispatch through the real hourly structural cadence, spread to their own targets rather than dogpiling one target, complete stalking and harvest, persist the west camp as harvested/no-active, persist the east camp as harvested-fixture-plus-new-structural-followthrough/no-repeat, and emit compact perf/log counters
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for multi-camp structural stress
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No Challenge A credit if startup/load, both saved preflight site states, bounded wait, both camps' same-run structural dispatch/stalking/harvest artifacts, save/writeback, saved harvested/no-repeat-or-followthrough state, and perf/log counters are not all present.
